description.ko: KURO-X는 수학적 정밀함과 디지털 혼돈의 융합을 나타냅니다. 이 테마는 날카롭고 각진 기하학적 구조와 체계적인 글리치 아티팩트를 결합하여 세련된 하이테크 비주얼 아이덴티티를 연출합니다.
description.en: KURO-X represents the fusion of mathematical precision and digital chaos. This theme utilizes sharp, angular geometries interrupted by systematic glitch artifacts to create a sophisticated, high-tech visual identity.

prompt: Cinematic visualization of KURO-X, geometric glitch art style, sharp polygonal fragments, digital data corruption, monochromatic black background with high-contrast white and neon violet accents, shifting architectural shapes, scanlines, chromatic aberration, futuristic cyberpunk aesthetic, 8k resolution, hyper-detailed texture.
